description: Phase WX-K.4 (2026-05-20) — minimal recipe for the `advisory` chip per HARNESS_PATHWAY_TAXONOMY.md. Fires for recommendation / comparison / 'what should I use' prompts that benefit from tone-of-voice guidance (wisdom-universal) and may invoke web-search tools. Distinguishes from `answer` chip by the inclusion of wisdom-universal (manners + citation discipline) — the recommendation pattern has different tone needs than 'tell me a joke'. v1 omits explicit web-search tool registration; the LLM can still recommend without live web access. Future K.4.b may add a `web-search-tool` layer registering WebSearchSkill / PerplexitySearchSkill for tool-calling.
